title: antidesma minus
intro: Antidesma minus, also known as the Antidesma plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, native to tropical Asia. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Antidesma minus include the potential treatment of fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an anti-diarrheal and anti-emetic agent. Herbal preparations of Antidesma minus include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
